name: Dutch Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------------CHEESECAKE---------------------------------
1 Large Egg, Separated
1/4 Cup Confectioners' Sugar; PLUS
Gouda Cheese, Grated; 1 1/2 Cups
Light Cream or Half & Half; 1/3 Cup
Unbleached Flour; 1/4 Cup
Lemon Juice; 1 Teaspoon
Lemon Rind, Grated; 1 Teaspoon
Raisins, Golden; 1/3 Cup
NOTE: Use an 8-inch tart pan in this recipe. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the egg yolks and 1/4 cup of confectioners' sugar until well blended for about 5 minutes. Beat in the cheese, cream, flour, lemon juice, lemon rind, and raisins. Beat the egg whites until frothy, then gradually add the remaining confectioners' sugar and continue to beat until the whites form stiff peaks. Fold the egg whites into the cheese mixture. Pour the cheese mixture into the prepared crust and bake for 45 minutes. Cool to room temperature, then chill before serving.
